---
description: "Use when verifying Caracal SDK version, SDK APIs, framework version, runtime version, package manager, deployment environment, and compatibility before code changes."
---
# SDK Version Selection

- Detect package manager and dependency files.
- Detect runtime and framework versions.
- Check whether a Caracal SDK is already installed.
- Verify the correct SDK version against Caracal and SDK documentation.
- Use official SDK terminology, methods, types, configuration structures, resource models, and provider models.
- Never generate SDK code from memory when version-specific documentation is available.
